system.effect: The psyker tears a hole in the fabric of reality, creating a brief portal that allows instantaneous teleportation. The psyker and up to Psy Rating allies within 5 metres are transported to a location within range that the psyker is aware of.

description.value: The psyker rends the veil between realspace and the Immaterium, creating a momentary gateway through the warp. The psyker and up to Psy Rating willing allies within 5 metres are instantaneously transported to any location within range that the psyker can see or has previously visited. Travel through the warp in this manner is not without risk -- each traveller must pass a Willpower test or suffer 1d5 Corruption Points from exposure to the Immaterium.
